title: opti1.21
description: vanilla build 1.21 with mods for optimization and a more convenient game.
body: This mod pack was developed by a 24-year-old man from Russia (@tele-tpm youtube) . This modpack has popular mods like Sodium, Iris, Xaero ma, WHITE and so on. This mod has its own resource packs, shaders are also available for weak PCs. It is convenient to play with him (this is purely my opinion). I collected mods in the vastness of modrin, coursforge. And that's all I can say. I wish you a successful game!
